title: CVS Health and Uber Health Collaborate to Advance Health Equity in Communities Nationwide
text: WOONSOCKET, R.I., Jan. 19, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- CVS Health (NYSE: CVS) today announced a collaboration with Uber Health, Uber's healthcare arm, to provide critical transportation support at no cost to people who need it most when seeking access to medical care, work or educational programs.

title: Walgreens and CVS temporarily close some stores as Covid surges
text: Two of the biggest retail pharmacies in the U.S. are temporarily closing some stores and pharmacies on the weekends as the latest surge in Covid-19 causes staff shortages.

title: Omicron forces CVS, Walgreens to temporarily shutter stores
text: Two of the country's largest retail pharmacies are temporarily closing stores on weekends due to an increase in the number of COVID-19 infections among staffers. The two chains said that the rapid spread of the Omicron variant has depleted staffing at several locations nationwide, affecting customer service and delaying key services like medication prescriptions and.

title: CVS, Walgreens temporarily close some stores amid omicron-related staffing shortages
text: This is the latest blow to pharmacies that have already dealt with a surge in demand for coronavirus vaccines and tests.

title: Walgreens, CVS shut some stores as Omicron variant complicates staffing issues
text: U.S. drugstore chain operators Walgreens Boots Alliance and CVS Health Corp said on Friday they were forced to temporarily shut some stores due to staffing issues triggered by the latest surge in COVID-19 infections.

title: Walgreens and CVS shut some pharmacies on weekends amid staffing strains
text: Walgreens and CVS said they are unable to quantify weekend closures, which fluctuate each week and sometimes occur without much notice.

title: CVS, Walgreens, Target, other major retailers targeted in multi-state theft ring
text: According to Tulsa County District Court documents, the suspects are facing 120 combined charges in connection with an operation targeting over-the-counter medication.

title: Endexx says three Blesswell facial products available at CVS Health stores
text: Endexx Corporation has announced that three facial products of the Blesswell skincare line are now available at select CVS Health stores and online at www.CVS.com. Launched in May of 2021 in partnership with Endexx, the Blesswell collection is designed to be an essential toolkit for a man's complete at-home self-care needs, the company said.

title: Walgreens, CVS cut paid sick leave for workers in line with CDC guidance
text: Walgreens Boots Alliance and CVS Health Corp have cut paid sick leave for workers who test positive for COVID-19, aligning their policies to a change in U.S. health guidance, the companies said on Tuesday.

title: CVS Health hikes 2021 earnings range and backs 2022 view
text: CVS Health Corp. CVS, +0.84% said Tuesday it expects to earn between $5.87 and $5.92 a share in 2021, up from its earlier guidance of $5.50 to $5.61. The company now expects full year 2021 adjusted earnings of $8.33 to $8.38 a share, up from its earlier view for earnings of at least $8 a share.
